Prayer.title: Prayer
Prayer.description: A prayer or request shared on the Wall of Light.

tokenId.description: The ID of the energy token selected.

candles.description: Number of candles lit for this prayer.

isCandleLit.description: Whether the original creator lit a candle.

createdAt.description: Timestamp in milliseconds when the prayer was created.

uid.description: The UID of the user who created the prayer.

prayers.description: Collection of prayers shared on the Wall of Light.
